title: Diff Pair File Schema
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of diff-pair files in examples/diff-pairs/. A diff-pair contrasts two taxonomy entries on the same axis applied to the same topic, with every other axis held constant.

diff_pair_id.description: Slug uniquely identifying this diff pair. Convention: <axis>-<entry_a>-vs-<entry_b>-<topic_slug>.

topic_slug.description: Slug of the anchor topic the pair is rendered on (e.g., async-standups).

axis_varied.description: The axis whose value differs between entry_a and entry_b. All other axes are held constant.

entry_a.description: Slug of the first taxonomy entry being contrasted.

entry_b.description: Slug of the second taxonomy entry being contrasted.

generator.description: Path to the script or process that produced this file, if applicable.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 date when the diff-pair was generated.

author_type.description: Who produced the diff-pair body. human = written by a person; llm = fully AI-generated; hybrid = AI-generated and then edited by a human.

llm_model.description: Model identifier (relevant when author_type is llm or hybrid).

notes.description: Optional curator notes about why this pair was chosen or what it teaches.
